readme.txt.message:
Mismatched Stable Tag: 1.1.0 != 2.0.0.
Your Stable Tag is meant to be the stable version of your plugin and it needs to be exactly the same with the Version in your main plugin file's header. Any mismatch can prevent users from downloading the correct plugin files from WordPress.org.

Mismatched Requires at least: 5.0 != 4.4.
"Requires at least" needs to be exactly the same with that in your main plugin file's header.
One or more tags were ignored. Please limit your plugin to 5 tags.
The plugin name includes a restricted term. Your chosen plugin name - "WPSeed Boilerplate" - contains the restricted term "wp" which cannot be used at all in your plugin name.
